allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add initial project documentation and technical research

- Added CLAUDE.md with comprehensive technical investigation results

- Added detailed Windows API integration documentation

Bash(git add CLAUDE.md README.md include/TaskbarWindow.h src/TaskbarWindow.cpp)

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Implement mouse coordinate-based display control

- Replace complex taskbar visibility monitoring with simple mouse coordinate-based logic
- Remove TaskbarVisibilityMonitor, Windows focus hooks, and state transition logic
- Add simple mouse position checking (Y >= 1070 show, Y < 984 hide)
- Fix app bar display area issues (ScrollArea height 21px -> 48px)
- Remove menu bar and status bar completely for proper layout
- Set display trigger at Y=1070 (10px from screen bottom)
- Set hide trigger at Y=984 (app bar top edge)
- Update documentation with new coordinate-based control specifications

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
